use_cases: Displaying animated gradient text for hero sections and headings
Creating premium-looking badge-style text labels with visual effects
Adding dynamic visual interest to call-to-action text elements
Styling accent text in marketing and promotional content
Enhancing feature highlights with animated gradient backgrounds
ai_summary: An animated gradient text component featuring glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur, animated gradient borders, and hover shadow effects. The component creates eye-catching premium text displays with smooth transitions and dark mode support, suitable for enhancing visual hierarchy in UI designs.
